title: ItzzGG_guy's Vanilla+
description: A simple Vanilla+ modpack that adds new structures achievements and QOL features!
body:
# Changes:
   This modpack adds the new structures and enchantments of the dungeons and taverns mod. It also adds some QOL features such as being able to access the shulker box from the inventory and not needing silk touch to mine ender chests. There are many graphical changes and there are new features to how first and third person work. Features such as freecam, notepad and, crops growing faster when it rains are also in this modpack.
## Keybinds:
- Toggle Freecam: F4
- Zoom in: C (if this doesn't work make sure to unbind/change the "save hotbar activator" keybind)
- Toggle Notepad: N
- Toggle Vanilla First Person View: F6 (if this doesn't work make sure to unbind/change the "secondary zoom" keybind)
